name: Tier 1 assistant query shows schedule message
description: Logged-in user asks what they have on a day via Command Bar and sees an assistant response message on the dashboard

planSteps.description: Type a unique email using tier1-query- plus random digits then @timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraE2E123! into the password field
If login fails because account does not exist, navigate to the register page, create the same account, then return to login and sign in
Wait for 5 seconds for the dashboard weekly calendar to load
Press Control+K or Meta+K to open the Command Bar
Type apa jadwal saya hari jumat into the Command Bar input
Wait for 3 seconds for the assistant response
Verify the dashboard shows an assistant message banner mentioning events or no events found for the requested day
